---
title: ""
format: html
---
## Syllabus
```{=html}
<style type="text/css">

code.r{
  font-size: 30px;
}
</style>

<a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Schedule/NRS 520 Syllabus.pdf">Syllabus (PDF)</a></p>
```


## Schedule {.smaller}

| Week  | Topic                                  |
|-------|----------------------------------------|
| 1     | Class Org., Information, R/Markdown    | 
| 2     | Study Design, Power Analysis, Sims.    | 
| 3     | Probability and Statistics             |
| 4     | Regression                             |
| 5     | Oct. 10 No Class / Holiday             |
| 6     | Generalized Linear Models              |
| 7     | Bayesian Models                        |
| 8     | Bayesian Models                        |
| 9     | Mixed Models / Hierarchical Models     |
| 10    | Regularization, Prediction, Cross-val. |
| 11    | Decision Making under Uncertainty      |
| 12-14 | Student lecture/lab                    |

: {tbl-colwidths="\[30,70\]"}


### Readings

Come prepared to discuss the assigned reading. What was interesting and useful? What did not make sense to you? What did you disagree with? What did you learn? <span style="color:red">Bring points to highlight and bring questions (make a list)</span>
